programmer_notes: IdentityDoc (name/description/delegates/threshold) with canonical JSON; RID = rad:z + base58btc(sha256(canonical)) matching Radicle's rad:z form. SignedIdentity verifies a threshold of distinct delegate Ed25519 signatures (duplicate-delegate safe, tamper-evident). New: src/gither/identity.py, tests/test_identity.py (11 tests), 'gither rad-id' CLI. 36 tests total.
summary: add content-addressed repository identity (RID) + delegate threshold signing
why: P2P layer 2: repositories need a stable, location-free identity (the GitHub-duplicate 'repository identity' primitive) and a rule for who may update it without a server. Modeled on Radicle's RID + delegate model; builds on gither.peer.
